title: JVL Miracle Beige with Brown Stripes Barrier Mat, 40 x 60 cm
features: Deep absorbent polypropylene pile lifts wet, dry and greasy dirt from shoes
Fitted with a slip resistant vinyl rubber backing, the mat is kept firmly in place while in use.
As well as commercial use, this mat also provides an ideal solution for home and private use.
Easily cleaned by vacuuming, brushing, shaking, steam cleaning or machine washing at 30 Degree C.
description: From the manufacturer About Us With 30 years' experience, JVL is a leading supplier and distributor of household products in the UK. We specialise in door mats and many other household products ranging from car mats, storage and laundry through to basketware and cleaning. We focus on quality, value and having a great range of products available to enhance every room in our customer’s home. Creative Team Our team are constantly researching the latest trends and colour palettes to ensure there’s always something new and fresh to offer. Door Mats We offer door mats made from a wide range of materials and sizes. All are designed to keep muddy footprints at the door and absorb moisture to prevent wet floors. In addition, the majority feature a slip resistant backing. With both modern and traditional designs available, we have an attractive doormat for everyone. Clothes Airers Our range of clothes airers start at indoor concertina and stretch all the way to outdoor rotary. If space is limited we have radiator dryers on offer as well as retractable options. Who can turn down the opportunity of an extra 60 metres of drying space? Coat Hangers JVL hangers are specifically made to be gentle on your clothes and durable for long lasting use. The majority of our hangers are ultra slim to ensure they save space in your wardrobe for extra clothes. With such a wide variety of colours, sizes and styles we have hangers to suit every member of the family. Cleaning Range Whether it’s mopping the floor, polishing your car or a full spring clean, you can make light work of those arduous chores with our cleaning products. We have a large selection of items such as brushes, mops, dusters and much more.
